REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR APR-21-2009 BEFORE HEARING; PARTIES MOTIONED TO PRIVATE MEDIATION IN LIEU OF JUDICIAL ARBITRATION

DEFENDANTS LINDSEY OFFENBACH, CHRISTOPHER OFFENBACH, MARGARET OFFENBACH'S MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING CASE TO PRIVATE MEDIATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to file and serve Order Granting Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Arbitration is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Compliance. Court ordered case scheduled for Jury Trial on 3/8/2010 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court ordered a Mediation Enforcement OSC scheduled on 12/2/3/2009 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Each counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/6/2009 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long, CSR#8620. (212) Written sanction Orders not issued. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Transferring This Case To Private Mediation And Declaration Of Richard M. Sanford, Esq. In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Lindsey Offenbach, Christopher Offenbach, Margaret Offenbach's Motion for Order Transferring Case to Private Mediation is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Mediation Order to Show Cause scheduled on 8/12/2009 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212, a Jury Trial Date of 11/16/2009 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Giselle Casey, CSR# 8098. (212)
